description_long: This object is a flat, rectangular control panel with a teal blue face and multiple analog dials, switches, and indicator lights arranged across its surface. The front side features a variety of round gauges, each with white markings and black backgrounds, as well as a central compass-like instrument. There are also several toggle switches and a small grid of labeled buttons, suggesting a complex interface for monitoring or controlling systems. The panel is bordered by a black rectangular section on one side and a brown box-like component at the bottom, both protruding slightly. The back of the panel is plain and unadorned, showing only the teal surface. The overall construction appears robust, with metallic and plastic elements dominating the design.
description: A teal blue control panel with multiple analog dials, switches, and indicator lights, featuring a robust, industrial design with black and brown protruding components.
description_view_0: The front view displays the full array of dials, switches, and indicator lights, with all interface elements clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the thin profile of the panel and the protrusion of the dials and bottom components.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain teal surface with no visible controls or features, only the black and brown components extending from the edges.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, highlighting the slimness of the panel and the depth of the protruding instruments.
